title: Shiny Horses Reborn
body:
Shiny Horses Reborn is based off of Shiny Horses by dragonostic & Shiny Horses - Enchantable Horse Armor by tinytransfem which are both forks of Enchantable Horse Armor by tfarecnim

This mod allows the enchanting of Horse Armor with almost all armor enchantments.

Full Enchantment List - Protection - Blast Protection - Projectile Protection - Thorns - Frost Walker * - Feather Falling - Soul Speed * *Applied with books on an anvil only (horse armor in slot one, book in slot two) **_QTARABSBA (Questions That Are Rarely Asked But Should Be Answered):_** _Will this be updated to newer versions?_ - Someday... Maybe... (I just need to sit down and figure out all the changes) _Will you add support for [INSERT MOD NAME HERE]?_ - If I can. You can request any compatibility (enchantments, methods of enchanting, armor. etc) on the GitHub.
